items.title: Missing-value handling pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  audit["audit: % missing per column"] --> diagnose{"MCAR / MAR / MNAR?"}
  diagnose -->|"low MCAR"| delete["listwise or column drop"]
  diagnose -->|"MAR"| impute["KNN / group median / MICE"]
  diagnose -->|"MNAR risk"| flag["indicator + careful impute"]
  impute --> scale["scale / encode"]
  flag --> scale
  delete --> scale
  scale --> model["downstream model"]
  impute --> trees["tree model with NaN splits"]
items.caption: Audit and mechanism reasoning come before treatment; fit all imputation statistics on training data only.

items.title: MCAR vs MAR vs MNAR
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  mcar["MCAR: missing unrelated to any values"]
  mar["MAR: missing depends on observed columns"]
  mnar["MNAR: missing depends on hidden value"]
  mcar --> safe["listwise deletion less biased"]
  mar --> model["impute using observed features"]
  mnar --> care["indicators, sensitivity analysis"]
items.caption: Mechanism classification guides how aggressively you can delete versus impute.
